purpose: Search for public labeled market-regime sources that could fill the 596 missing current MainRegimeV2 root-label slots without promoting proxy labels.

candidate_sources.name: Kaggle stock-market-regimes-2000-2026
candidate_sources.reason: Current attachability audit attaches 16/612 slots, limited to yfinance ^DJI/^GSPC 1d/1w; it does not cover missing intraday/monthly, Kraken, broad yfinance, or Manipulation slots.

candidate_sources.name: Hugging Face Multi_Timeframe_Market_Regimes_HMM6_BTCUSD
candidate_sources.reason: Dataset labels are HMM-derived/model-inferred BTCUSD 5m/15m regimes with arbitrary state ids/post-hoc interpretation; they are not independent source-backed Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis labels and cannot fill the current root-label contract.

candidate_sources.name: Hugging Face TSIE-style IDX signal classes
candidate_sources.reason: Prior metadata audit found 0 accepted/manual full-root panel candidates; Crisis and direct Manipulation labels are missing.

sweep_result.next_action: Acquire non-public/proprietary or explicitly labeled multi-asset multi-timeframe source labels for the missing 596 slots; public HMM/HF/OHLCV-derived regime labels remain sidecar-only.
